prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-LEDWORKLIGHT-LARGE-BLACKORANGE Product Type: ELECTRIC_LIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 750 Lumen Durable Portable Work Light Indoor Outdoor Multi Use Black Description: This high powered work is extremely viable in a outdoor setting in terms of hiking, camping, barbecuing, car repair and more. It is also useful in emergencies such as power outages, and it is energy efficient with a long lasting battery life. The 750 lumen will make it brighter than most lights powered by four AA batteries. The material is Nylon, it is highly durable and can withstand strong impacts. The work light is small and compact that one can bring anywhere with them especially in outdoor occasions.

In a natural disaster many locals within the region of the disaster lose power or even lose possession of their belongings. In desperate measures a high powered light is extremely viable for situations like a natural disaster or any emergency for that matter such as a car breaking down in the middle of the night. This high powered LED light is perfect for any emergency or any outdoor activity that one might do at night.

If you love the outdoors or want to be ready for an emergency this item can make experiences much better or make you feel ready when there is a actual emergency. This item is small, but it is a high powered LED light. Buying more than one item can be more ideal. For example, having a work in the house and having a light in the car just in case. Buy this item and act now to gain a better experience in the lovely outdoors, and be ready for what can possibly come at night. Search Terms: LED light work fishing energy efficient longer battery life high powered Features: - High powered 750 Lumen with energy efficient long lasting battery. - Thick Nylon and durable material can withstand being dropped. - Easy grip handle. Can hang inside a tent or wherever comfortably and easily. This light is perfect for emergencies. It can be positioned in various ways to increase visibility. - Uses four AA batteries (batteries not included). - User friendly. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
